headline: Google And Four Blue Dots Lead 5 Stocks Near Buy Points
summary: The list includes two additional AI-related plays: Power transmission system and electrical wiring supplier Hubbell and Avnet, a major distributor of semiconductors and other electronic components.  Viking has a superlative IBD Composite Rating of 99 out of a possible 99, according to IBD Stock Checkup.  Viking is on the watchlist for the IBD Leaderboard portfolio of elite stocks.
